manifest.name: Hero Banner
manifest.description: Full-width hero section with heading, subheading, and call-to-action
manifest.solves: Creating a focal point for page entry and primary action

do: Single clear CTA above the fold
Contrast ratio 7:1+ for text over images
never: Text that requires scrolling to read

blocks.content: Build something extraordinary with a design system that understands intent.
Get started in minutes with a single command.
